title: Update SQL Export Modal Title and Default Quote Character
story: As a data migration specialist, I want the SQL export modal to have a clear title and default to single quotes for static values, so that the generated SQL follows the most common convention.
description:
Two updates to the SQL export modal:

1. **Modal title**: Changed to "Generate SQL Mapping"
2. **Static value quoting**: Default quote character changed to single quote (`'`), which is the most common convention in SQL
acceptance_criteria: SQL export modal title reads 'Generate SQL Mapping'
Static value default quote character is single quote
Generated SQL uses single quotes for static values by default
ux_changes: SQL export modal title updated to 'Generate SQL Mapping'. Static value default quote character changed to single quote.
comment_summary: Developer completed the changes and deployed to staging. No issues reported.
